ABOUT

01 — About

Who I Am.

Hi! I'm Jessica Laurencia Panjaitan, an Informatics Engineering student at Universitas Diponegoro (UNDIP), currently in my 4th semester. Based in Semarang, Central Java — originally from Medan, North Sumatra.

I have a solid foundation in programming, database systems, and computer networking, alongside extensive organizational experience handling roles in secretarial work, event management, publication & design, and public relations.

I'm highly motivated to apply my technical skills to build impactful digital products and support collaborative engineering teams. I'm currently available for internships and project collaborations.

Education: FSM UNDIP — Informatics Engineering, 2024–Present. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, Database Systems, Computer Networks, Web Programming, Linear Algebra, Discrete Mathematics.

Award: 🥇 Gold Medal — Mathematics Olympiad, Telkom University, 2023.

WORK

02 — Projects

Selected Work.

5 projects — GitHub & Demo links available
⌥ GitHub ▶ Demo
Project / 01 — Networking
Network Topology Design

Built a computer network structure based on a case study using Cisco Packet Tracer — covering subnetting, router & switch configuration, and connectivity testing across network segments.

Cisco Packet TracerTCP/IPSubnettingRouting
⌥ GitHub ▶ Demo
Project / 02 — Game Dev
Cooking Game (Dev-C++)

A simple cooking-themed game developed in Dev-C++. Players must complete recipes within a time limit using keyboard input mechanics and a score system.

Dev-C++C++Game LogicOOP
⌥ GitHub ▶ Demo
Project / 03 — Computer Graphics
Interactive Computer Graphics

Creation of game support elements using computer graphics techniques — including 2D/3D object rendering, geometric transformations, and user-input-based interaction.

Computer GraphicsOpenGLC++2D/3D
⌥ GitHub ▶ Demo
Project / 04 — IoT
Rain Sensor IoT App

A simple IoT application using a rain sensor to detect rainfall in real-time. Sensor data is transmitted and displayed through an easy-to-understand interface.

IoTArduinoRain SensorReal-time
⌥ GitHub
Project / 05 — Web Dev
Task Tracker Web App

A simple web application for tracking academic assignments — features include add, edit, delete, and mark-as-done functionality. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP with a MySQL database.

HTML/CSSJavaScriptPHPMySQL
